title: build_chat_request_body cyclomatic complexity exceeds 15 with three provider branches
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
complexity
## Location
src/main.rs:912-1020
## Violation
build_chat_request_body has 100+ lines, three provider branches each with complex JSON construction, two suffix mutations (claude_code_token injection, effort_level thinking), and inline filter_map. Cyclomatic complexity exceeds 15.

This is a Stovepipe Systems anti-pattern — every provider re-implements its own message-shape translation instead of delegating to the ProviderAdapter trait that already exists.

## Mandated refactor
Add to ProviderAdapter: build_chat_request_body method. Each provider implements its own — the trait owns the shape. main.rs collapses to adapter.build_chat_request_body plus the cross-cutting injection.

## Filed from QA review dispatch
